title: Hardex
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Hardex |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]][[Droids (1995) 6|''Droids'' (1995) 6]] |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Hardex system/Legends|Hardex system]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}{{Planetnamia|species=Hardex|system=[[Hardex system/Legends|Hardex system]]|legends=1}} |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|Better have my protocol droid standing by.''"
"''Your Brilliancy will recall that he was, ah, ''reassigned'' when his translation of your joke about the ''three Hardex'' and the ''bantha'' failed to amuse the Hardexian ambassador.|Craw and Steggus|}} The '''Hardex''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Hardex system/Legends|Hardex system]] in the [[Jubilar sector/Legends|Jubilar sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. At some point by [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]],''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Droids]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Droids (1995)|''Star Wars: Droids'' (1995)]], which includes [[Droids (1995) 6|''Droids'' (1995) 6]], to [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]]. The [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] places the Hardex [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] meeting with [[Craw]] to before the story's events. the Hardex sent an [[Unidentified Hardexian ambassador|ambassador]] to the [[Targonnian]] leader [[Craw]]. Craw told a joke involving three Hardex and a [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] to the [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]]. However, when the leader's [[Craw's protocol droid|protocol droid]] [[Translator/Legends|translated]] the joke for the ambassador, they did not find it amusing. Consequently, Craw had the [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] deactivated and repurposed into a [[Water/Legends|water]] fountain. In 5.5 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], the Targonnian [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Steggus]] reminded Craw of the joke and the ambassador's reaction to it. ==Behind the scenes== Hardex were mentioned in the [[Droids (1995) 6|sixth issue]] of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series [[Star Wars: Droids (1994)|''Star Wars: Droids'']], which was written by [[Jan Strnad]] and released by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[October 31]], [[1995]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54170/star_wars_droids_1995_6|text=Star Wars: Droids (1995) #6}} ==Appearances== *[[Droids (1995) 6|''Droids'' (1995) 6]] {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Outer Rim Territories sentient species]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Hardex]] }}
